metadata.homeTitle: Al Hamdan Digital | Smart Digital Products
metadata.homeDescription: We build smart digital products powered by AI and human expertise — app development, digital marketing, and integrated digital solutions.
metadata.siteDescription: Digital products powered by artificial intelligence and human expertise.

hero.body: At Al Hamdan Digital, we combine the power of artificial intelligence with a specialized team to build applications, develop digital products, and manage digital marketing faster and more efficiently.

ai.title: AI-Powered
ai.body: We use artificial intelligence across project phases to increase speed and improve efficiency.

scale.title: Scalable Solutions
scale.body: We design products and services that scale as businesses grow.

expertise.title: Specialized Human Expertise
expertise.body: Every deliverable is reviewed and refined by a professional team before launch.

mindset.title: Product-Building Mindset
mindset.body: We think like digital product owners, not just service providers.

about.heading: About Al Hamdan
about.body: A modern technology company specialized in smart app development, digital solutions, and digital marketing. We combine AI speed with human precision to deliver more efficient, higher-quality, and scalable solutions. We also own our own digital products, giving us real hands-on experience building, launching, and growing products in the market—not just delivering client projects.

visionMission.visionBody: For Al Hamdan Digital to be an influential technology company driving digital transformation through practical applications, smart services, and AI-powered solutions without sacrificing human expertise.
visionMission.missionBody: Deliver integrated digital solutions that help companies and projects enter the market with confidence through professional apps, effective digital marketing, and AI to accelerate work, improve quality, and reduce wasted time and cost.

process.title: How We Turn Ideas Into Successful Digital Products
process.body: We rely on a methodology that combines AI and human expertise to ensure fast execution, quality output, and the best results.

1.title: Discovery & Needs Analysis
1.body: Understanding the project, goals, and target audience.

2.title: AI-Powered Analysis
2.body: Analyzing requirements and generating initial ideas and insights.

3.title: Planning & Strategy
3.body: Building the roadmap and defining features and priorities.

4.title: User Experience Design
4.body: Designing a clear and easy experience for the audience.

5.title: Development & Testing
5.body: Building and testing the product for quality and performance.

6.title: Launch & Continuous Improvement
6.body: Launching the product and evolving it based on usage data.

products.title: Digital Products We Build and Develop Ourselves
products.body: We own a portfolio of digital applications serving vital and in-demand market sectors, giving us direct hands-on experience building and operating digital products.

bohamdan.title: Bo Hamdan
bohamdan.body: A platform for professionally showcasing, selling, and renting cars with ease.

diddeed.title: Did Deed
diddeed.body: An app that simplifies transport requests with a fast, clear user experience.

road80.title: Road 80
road80.body: A modern real estate platform for organized property sales and rentals.

nafas.title: NAFAS
nafas.body: A fitness app helping users build a healthier, more active lifestyle.

services.title: Integrated Digital Services for Business Growth
services.body: We offer digital services that help companies and projects build a strong presence and achieve sustainable growth.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.body: We design and develop apps from idea to launch, focusing on performance, UX, and scalability.

marketing.title: Digital Marketing
marketing.body: We help companies reach their audience through professional content, campaigns, and effective digital strategies.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.body: We use AI to improve operations, develop ideas, and boost business and marketing performance.

products.title: Digital Product Building & Management
products.body: We help companies turn ideas into clear digital products ready to launch and grow in the market.

sectors.title: Diverse Sectors, Flexible Solutions
sectors.body: We serve a wide range of sectors and projects seeking to build a strong digital presence.

reasons.1: A real understanding of market and customer challenges.
reasons.3: Development and marketing integrated in one system.
reasons.4: Practical use of AI across workflow stages.
reasons.5: Professional human review of every deliverable.
reasons.6: Hands-on experience through products we own and operate.

market.title: From Idea to Market
market.body1: We don't just build apps or run marketing campaigns—we help clients move from idea to product, and from product to real market growth.
market.body2: We rely on modern technology, AI, and practical experience to deliver solutions with real, measurable value.

adminAuth.title: Welcome to Al Hamdan Digital
adminAuth.subtitle: Sign in to manage website content.
adminAuth.validationFailed: Please fix the highlighted fields before signing in.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.invalidSlug: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation.dateInPast: The date cannot be in the past.
validation.endBeforeStart: The end date must be after the start date.
validation.invalidRedirectUrl: Use a relative path or an http(s) URL.
validation.sortOrderRange: Enter a whole number between 0 and 9999.

dashboard.searchNoResults: No dashboard sections match your search.

dashboard.continueEditingBody: Jump back into the page you were working on.
dashboard.statsBody: Your CMS coverage based on configured home and about content.
dashboard.tipOne: Save drafts after major section changes to avoid losing work.
dashboard.tipTwo: Use Arabic and English fields together to keep locales aligned.
dashboard.tipThree: Upload WebP-ready images for faster public page loads.

assistant.title: AI Assistant options
assistant.subtitle: Curate the options visitors see in the floating chat. Each option maps to one of your existing products; leave a field blank to use the product's own title, description, or project link.
assistant.emptyBody: Add your first option to start guiding visitors to the right product.
assistant.formHint: Pick a product, then optionally customize the text and link the visitor sees.
assistant.redirectHint: Leave empty to use the product's project page, or enter a custom link.
assistant.deleteBody: This removes the option from the floating assistant. Your product itself is not affected.

profile.title: Profile and security
profile.subtitle: Update the admin identity used across the dashboard and rotate the password when needed.
profile.name: Display name

assistant.headerSubtitle: Here to point you the right way
assistant.welcome: Welcome to Al Hamdan Digital 👋 I'm your smart assistant — how can I help you today?
assistant.greeting: 👋 Hi! What are you looking for today?

productsUi.hint: Each product appears as a card. Click Edit to open its details.
productsUi.empty: No products yet. Click Add product to get started.
productsUi.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete “{title}”? Save the draft to apply this change.
productsUi.deletedAfterSave: The deletion of “{title}” has been saved to the draft.
productsUi.createDialogHint: Add the new product details here, then click Done to add it to the draft.
productsUi.editDialogHint: Update this product’s details here, then click Done to apply the changes.
productsUi.createSaveReminder: Click Done to add this new product to the About draft.
productsUi.editSaveReminder: Click Done to update this product in the About draft.

detailPage.title: Project detail page
detailPage.body: Create a dedicated page at /projects/slug with extra information beyond the About section.
detailPage.launchOfferHint: Write a clear, limited incentive, for example: the first 500 users receive a free featured listing.
detailPage.comparisonHint: Add one row for each meaningful difference, for example: a week to sell the traditional way versus hours with the app.
detailPage.faqHint: Answer the questions that might delay a download, such as: Is the app free? Does it work outside Kuwait?
detailPage.question: Question

blog.managerBody: Create bilingual articles with SEO metadata, cover images, categories, and tags. Save drafts or publish when ready.
blog.emptyBody: Create your first article to start publishing insights, news, and guides.
blog.editorBody: Fill Arabic and English content, then save a draft or publish.
blog.editorHintEn: Use a short, keyword-focused slug and meta description for better SEO.
blog.editorHintAr: اكتب عنوانًا واضحًا ووصفًا ميتا مناسبًا لتحسين الظهور في البحث.
blog.draftCreated: New article draft created. You can keep editing or publish when ready.
blog.draftUpdated: Article draft updated with your latest changes.
blog.publishedSuccess: Article published. It is now visible on the public blog.
blog.deletedSuccess: Article deleted and removed from the blog.
blog.validationFailed: Fix {count} required fields before saving. We focused the first field that needs attention.

title.ar: لماذا المحتوى ثنائي اللغة مهم لعلامتك؟
title.en: Why bilingual content matters for your brand

excerpt.ar: الجمع بين العربية والإنجليزية يوسّع الوصول ويعزز الثقة في السوق الكويتي والخليجي.
excerpt.en: Combining Arabic and English expands reach and builds trust in Kuwait and the Gulf.

body.ar:
المحتوى ثنائي اللغة ليس ترجمة حرفية فقط، بل تجربة محلية كاملة تشمل العناوين، والصور، والدعوات للإجراء.

ابدأ بتحديد نبرة واحدة لكل لغة، ثم حافظ على نفس الرسالة الأساسية في الحقلين.
body.en:
Bilingual content is not just literal translation. It is a localized experience across headlines, visuals, and calls to action.

Start with one tone per language while keeping the same core message in both fields.

metaTitle.ar: لماذا المحتوى ثنائي اللغة مهم | Al Hamdan Digital
metaTitle.en: Why bilingual content matters | Al Hamdan Digital

metaDescription.ar: دليل سريع لبناء محتوى عربي وإنجليزي يخدم جمهورك في الكويت.
metaDescription.en: A quick guide to building Arabic and English content for your Kuwait audience.

ogDescription.ar: نصائح عملية لتحرير محتوى ثنائي اللغة.
ogDescription.en: Practical tips for bilingual content editing.
